title: Look a PC Protective cover
wikitext:
[]: Look, a PC Protective cover             Quote Post by Lagann » Sat May 30, 2009 9:46 pm http://pc.watch.impress.co.jp/docs/news/20090529_170397.html

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat May 30, 2009 9:54 pm Oy.....This is getting old. So many things I WISH I could buy but sadly, that just is not going to happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Sat May 30, 2009 10:03 pm Their not going to stop until every product has a Eva version of it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 30, 2009 10:54 pm Kinda cool but... yeah. ^^; EDIT: Fixed the thread name.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sat May 30, 2009 10:57 pm ............what? First a friggin' expansive as hell cellphone, and now a laptop. And it says its 10,500 yen, which is like....$110, most likely a POS.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat May 30, 2009 11:25 pm It's not a laptop, it's a protective cover for the "Let's Note R8/7/6" series of laptops (which are around $1500USD).

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun May 31, 2009 12:29 am I want one of those red monochrome laptops from the original series.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun May 31, 2009 1:07 am coming soon: "Evangelion the flamethrower"

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sun May 31, 2009 1:36 am Ornette wrote: It's not a laptop, it's a protective cover for the "Let's Note R8/7/6" series of laptops (which are around $1500USD).
